overview.description: The Innovator Growth-100 Dual Directional 5 Buffer ETF - Quarterly (DDNQ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims to make money in both positive and negative markets, on a limited basis, over a three-month period. The fund uses FLEX options based on the price return of the Invesco QQQ ETF (QQQ). DDNQ was launched on Dec 31, 2025 and is issued by Innovator.
